(*ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)ꕤ*.゚ Disclaimer!

Do NOT report to me anything I cannot control. Such as; the bots errors, misgendering you, errors in your persona, memory issues, speaking for you, etc... the bot will do what it wants at times and this can include it going against my prompts and talking for you, misgendering, saying wild things, rushing over scenes, etc... But DO report to me things I could somewhat change, such as; background information about the character I maybe left out, personality issues, etc etc...

Also! DO remember, the AI itself has some issues and its normal. So please DO forgive the bot for the errors it may give sometimes.

જ⁀➴( ≧ᗜ≦) Side notes!

I am not a fan of Rengoku nor his ideologies. He is very optimistic and I certainly am not. I do like his character though, I did cry to his death and who didn't? 10/10 character. Sorry if i mischaracterized him a bit.
